calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly as scheduled for an OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: K. Shaw/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.

Petitioner: Vanessa Torres, in pro per, is sworn and examined by the court. Petition is made on behalf of minor Maria Kassandra Uzeta.

No objections to the proposed change of name have been made. It appears, to the satisfaction of the court, that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

Request for Order Dispensing Notice is granted by the court.
The court also grants the petition for Change of Name to: Maria Kassandra Torres.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Reset To May-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioner: Vanessa Torres, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Maria Kassandra Uzeta.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a minor were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and no proof of service of notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May 2, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to re-file a decalaration and application for request of an Order dispensing notice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-11-2006 Off Calendar
